programs.title: The Rising
programs.desc: Neve wants revenge for herself and others. Pursuing her killer, Neve allows the anger to consume her. Will she succumb to the darkness within?

programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: In rural New Jersey, Gordon Ramsay visits Flamangos, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways.

programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: Gordon visits the Hot Potato Café in Fishtown, Philadelphia. With no profit made in its two years of trading and an influential restaurant reviewer dubbing them `Spuddy Hell', Gordon soon realises Hot Potato may have had its chips.

programs.title: Ed And Karen's Recipes for Success
programs.desc: Looking for a healthy and tasty treat or something for a special occasion? Join Better Homes and Gardens' Karen and Fast Ed for amazing decadent dessert recipes.

programs.title: The Girl In The Woods
programs.desc: An alarming truth about the Bloodherd sets Carrie and Tasha in action, fighting to save their loved ones from the corrupting influence of Gehenna.

programs.title: It's Academic
programs.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.
